name: ATLANTIC AMERICAN CORP
summary: Atlantic American Corporation is a Georgia-based insurance holding company incorporated in 1968. It operates through two primary subsidiaries: American Southern Insurance Company (property and casualty), offering commercial automobile, general liability, and surety bond coverage in 32 states and D.C.; and Bankers Fidelity (life and health), offering Medicare supplement, life insurance, and accident and health products across 46 states through approximately 6,243 licensed independent agents.

products.name: Commercial Automobile Insurance
products.description: Bodily injury, property damage liability, uninsured motorist, and physical damage coverage for commercial accounts and government fleets.

products.name: General Liability Insurance
products.description: Bodily injury and property damage liability coverage for premises and completed operations for general business classes.

products.name: Surety Bonds
products.description: Guarantees fulfillment of contractual obligations including subdivision construction, school bus contracts, and performance and payment bonds.

products.name: Medicare Supplement Insurance
products.description: Coverage for expenses not covered by Medicare, including copayments and deductibles; offers 8 of 10 standardized plans under OBRA 1990.

products.name: Life Insurance
products.description: Non-participating individual and group whole life insurance policies with various riders and options.

products.name: Vantage Flex Plus
products.description: A hospital indemnity plan offered by Bankers Fidelity as a differentiated health insurance product.

products.name: Vantage Recovery
products.description: Short-term care insurance product offered by Bankers Fidelity.

products.name: Group Whole Life with Chronic Illness Rider
products.description: Group whole life insurance product featuring a chronic illness rider offered through Bankers Fidelity.

products.name: Other Accident and Health Insurance
products.description: Individual and group policies covering cancer, critical illness, short-term nursing care, disability, and accident/hospital cash benefits.
